use tracing::{info, span, Level};

fn process_batch(records: &[Record]) {
    for record in records {
        // BAD: tracing fields allocated before subscriber can filter
        let details = format!("id={}, name={}, data={:?}", record.id, record.name, record.data);
        let span = span!(Level::INFO, "record", details = %details);
        let _enter = span.enter();
        // process record...
    }
}

struct Record {
    id: u64,
    name: String,
    data: Vec<u8>,
}
